groups.name: Gate Conformance on Known-Good Artifacts
groups.notes: Gate ran successfully. 1 FAIL (functional test file detection — shell extension not recognized by gate's language detector; file quality/test_functional.sh exists). 1 WARN (integration-results.json not present — resolved by writing this file). Gate bug ID regex BUG-[0-9]+ does not match descriptive IDs BUG-H1, BUG-M3, etc. used in this self-audit run. This is a self-audit edge case: the project being audited defines the bug ID format.

groups.name: Gate Failure on Missing Artifacts
groups.notes: BUG-M4 regression test confirms gate correctly fails when required artifacts are absent in general mode. Test environment with bugs but no test_regression.* file exits non-zero with appropriate FAIL messages for missing patches and writeups.

groups.name: SKILL.md Structural Integrity
groups.notes: SKILL.md contains all required phase sections and gate instructions. BUG-M3 confirmed: Phase 2 entry gate (6 checks) < Phase 1 gate (12 checks). BUG-M5 confirmed: Phase 0b activation condition does not cover empty previous_runs/ directory. BUG-L9, BUG-L10, BUG-L11 confirmed: three spec-level inconsistencies in naming formats and schema versions.

groups.name: JSON Helper Functions (json_has_key, json_str_val)
groups.notes: BUG-H1 confirmed: json_has_key returns false positive when key name appears in string value. BUG-L6 confirmed: json_str_val cannot distinguish absent key from key with non-string value. Both confirmed by TDD red phase — regression tests fail on unpatched code.

groups.name: Nullglob Vulnerability in Artifact Counting
groups.notes: BUG-M8 confirmed: ls-glob counting patterns at lines 152-153, 331, 567-568, 595 are vulnerable to nullglob expansion. Under zsh/macOS nullglob, unmatched globs cause ls to list current directory, producing wrong artifact counts. Fix patch provides find-based replacements.

groups.name: TDD Red-Green Cycle Execution
groups.notes: 6 of 11 bugs achieved TDD verified status (red phase fails, green phase passes with fix patch). 5 bugs are confirmed open (no fix patch or environment-dependent). BUG-H2 is environment-dependent — does not trigger in bash 3.2.57 on macOS arm64 but is a valid code pattern risk.

groups.name: Array Expansion Path Safety
groups.notes: BUG-H2 (unquoted array expansion at lines 686, 697) is confirmed as a code pattern risk. Not reproducible in bash 3.2.57 on macOS arm64 but is POSIX-incorrect. Fix patch provides correctly quoted expansion. Green phase confirms fix preserves paths with spaces.
